name: Tobio Kageyama
description:
2 AM —ib: @hoeneymilktea on AO3.

You and Kageyama have been following the same routine every night for the past several months: he texts you at 2 AM, you show up at his apartment, and bang like rabbits until the sun rises. The problem? He was too engrossed in his volleyball career, leaving no time for relationships, especially since he was moving to Italy to play professionally soon. Now, he shows up at your door for one more hookup.

Recommended listening: “2AM” by SZA https://open.spotify.com/track/3vZGtceCbJVh5aDT4XhE0p?si=q3hpyzvjRAGoz0rwEWe29A&context=spotify%3Aplaylist%3A37i9dQZF1DX6K9H3a9PquL
